parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When enabled, the cache will capture input frames.

parameters.name: cachesize
parameters.label: Cache Size
parameters.description: The maximum number of snapshots to hold in the cache. When full, oldest ones are replaced with the newest ones.

parameters.name: step
parameters.label: Step Size
parameters.description: Time steps between snapshots into cache.

parameters.name: outputindex
parameters.label: Output Index
parameters.description: Specify tbe index of to output - 0 is current, negative is farther into past.

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: Resets cache and holds one snapshot.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

examples.label: Configure Cache Size and Active
examples.description: Common settings from 10 real Derivative examples
